mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP growth rate signals a weakening demand for goods and services, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in any period are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production rate signals a strengthening supply of goods and services, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing starts rate signals a weakening demand for housing, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in any period are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales rate signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals a weakening monetary policy stance, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
